_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of multiple cognitive domains and appropriate tools and methods for learning in each domain.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.442), DG-K-009 (DG, cosine: 0.431).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.516). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, learning, methods]. DCWF-only terms [appropriate, cognitive, domain, domains, multiple, tools] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, models] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.890 (P=0.896, R=0.885). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of multiple cognitive domains and appropriate tools and methods for le" and "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.464 < STS 0.516 (gap -0.052). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [appropriate, cognitive, domain] and [adult, blended, delivery] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, learning, methods]. DCWF-only: [appropriate, cognitive, domain, domains, multiple, tools]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, design, instructional, models].
